narrative:
20 Ohio House district has 81,709 registered voters, with 67.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 2.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.2 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.5% D−R vs +49.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
